summary: Adjusted the chapter opening to use a distinct entry construction from Chapter 2 while preserving all core beats, and added a single closing texture line to smooth handoff into the adjacent chapter's morning-post setup.
edits: Reframed the first action to begin in the scullery with the failed tap, replacing the prior wake-in-bed opening scaffold.
Kept original cold-wave, household deprivation, and character-beat information intact while preserving dialogue register and tone.
Added one final line about both letter slots rattling in the wind to lightly bridge into Chapter 2's opening post beat without introducing new events.
